8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.openknx/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.openknx/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
